_comment: Copy to organize.config.json and edit. Defines how your favorites are organized. All keys optional; omitted keys use the built-in security/pentest defaults.
_sort_help: 'name' = alphabetical within each folder; 'recent' = newest first by date added (browser exports carry no visit counts, so true 'most used' isn't available).
_frequent_help: Substrings (matched against URL or title) that float a link into a top '★ Frequently Used' folder. This is your manual most-used pin list.
